title: CVE-2026-50734: Apache ActiveMQ RCE
summary: [P1] Apache ActiveMQ is vulnerable to a memory allocation vulnerability with excessive size value, which can be exploited for remote code execution. There is no available patch for this vulnerability. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): none (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: Apache ActiveMQ is a framework that can be exploited for remote code execution
